title: Floodfill Lights
description: A vanilla shader that adds colored lighting.
body:
A resource pack that adds colored lighting to Minecraft using vanilla shaders.
Enable the [_Fabulous!_](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Graphics_settings) graphics mode before loading the pack. Incompatible with Sodium. ![Different light sources emitting colored light](https://github.com/JNNGL/vanilla-shaders/raw/main/images/colored_lights.png)
